response:
```sql
SELECT COUNT(T1.flight_id) 
FROM flights AS T1 
JOIN airports AS T2 ON T1.source_airport_id = T2.airport_id 
JOIN airports AS T3 ON T1.dest_airport_id = T3.airport_id 
JOIN cities AS T4 ON T2.city_id = T4.city_id 
JOIN cities AS T5 ON T3.city_id = T5.city_id 
WHERE T4.city_name = 'Aberdeen' AND T5.city_name = 'Ashley';
```
